discover.title: Discover
discover.subtitle: Explore artworks and monuments with the fastest entry points: photo analysis, voice question, or your recent sessions.
discover.photo_title: Take a Photo of an Artwork
discover.photo_desc: Launch the camera directly and ask Musaium to analyze an artwork, monument, or cultural detail.
discover.voice_desc: Start an audio-first chat to record a spoken question while visiting a museum or monument.
discover.continue_desc: Open your dashboard to resume previous art sessions, saved chats, and recent interpretations.
discover.guided_desc: Learn how guided mode adds next-stop suggestions and richer context for museum visits.

guidedMode.title: Guided Museum Mode
guidedMode.subtitle: Guided mode turns Musaium into a museum companion: it explains the artwork and suggests a relevant next step for your visit.
guidedMode.card1_text: Musaium adds practical museum-oriented guidance such as the next stop, transitions between rooms, and observation prompts tied to nearby works or monuments.
guidedMode.card2_text: Standard mode stays concise and descriptive. Guided mode remains art-focused but actively supports your path through an exhibition or cultural site.
guidedMode.card3_text: Beginner uses simple educational language. Intermediate introduces short technical terms. Expert adds deeper art-history vocabulary and context.
guidedMode.card4_text: Example guided behavior: explain brushwork, connect the piece to its historical movement, then suggest a nearby work to compare composition or symbolism.
guidedMode.turn_off: Go to Preferences to Turn Off Guided Mode
guidedMode.turn_on: Go to Preferences to Turn On Guided Mode

privacy.subtitle: This page explains how Musaium processes personal data, user rights under GDPR/RGPD, and how to contact support for privacy requests.
privacy.prerelease_text: These items should be validated before publishing to stores or production users.
privacy.request_text: For access, deletion, rectification, or objection requests, contact the team via the support page and include "privacy request" in your message until a dedicated legal workflow is finalized.

consent.title: AI-Generated Responses
consent.body: The responses you receive are produced by artificial intelligence. They may contain inaccuracies or errors. Always verify important information independently.
consent.info_accuracy: Responses may be inaccurate — always cross-check critical facts.
consent.info_privacy: Your data is processed in accordance with our privacy policy.
consent.info_report: You can report any problematic response using the flag button.
consent.info_granular: Choose which data each AI provider receives — toggle on or off per category.
consent.info_revoke: You can withdraw any consent later from Settings.
consent.scope_text_hint: Your typed prompts are sent to this AI provider for response generation.
consent.scope_image_hint: Photos you attach are sent (metadata is stripped before transmission).
consent.scope_audio_hint: Audio is transcribed locally then the text is sent ; the audio itself is never stored by the AI.
consent.scope_profile_hint: Your art preferences and prior conversations are shared to personalize responses.
consent.data_audio: Voice messages (transcribed only, audio not stored by AI)
consent.data_location: Your location (if you choose to share it)
consent.data_profile: Your art preferences and visit history (to personalize responses)
consent.data_providers: Processed by third-party AI services: OpenAI, Google, and DeepSeek
consent.summary_only_content: Only the text, images and audio you send are shared — nothing else.
consent.summary_no_personal_data: No personal data (name, email, precise location) is transmitted to AI providers.
consent.summary_processing: Processing is limited to response generation by the declared providers (OpenAI, Google).
consent.summary_revoke_anytime: You can manage or revoke your consent at any time from Settings.
consent.manage_subtitle: Uncheck any category freely. The "OpenAI Text" scope is required to chat with the AI.
consent.save_required_hint: Enable "OpenAI Text" to save your choices.
consent.scope_location_hint: Your approximate neighbourhood (district + city) is shared with the AI to recognize nearby museums and monuments. Your street, address and precise location are never shared.
consent.scope_location_coarse_hint: Only your city and country are shared with the AI — a less precise option than the neighbourhood level. Your street and precise location are never shared.

analyticsConsent.title: Help us improve Musaium
analyticsConsent.description: With your consent we anonymously measure how the app is used (pages viewed, features used). No personal data, no advertising tracker — just aggregated counters that help us understand what works.
